_comment: Physics-based cavalry charge (#100). Seed-plus-orders replay: at ~0.2s both player Cavalry (uids 3, 4) are ordered to charge the enemy Infantry (uid 6). They gallop in head-on and slam into the line — the charge bonus now scales with their impact velocity (speed + direction at contact), so a full-speed head-on hit lands hard, while glancing or near-stationary contact earns little. The damage change isn't a visible motion difference; see the PR diff / tests for the model.
caption: Physics-based cavalry charge (#100): the charge bonus is now the rider's impact momentum — it scales with closing speed AND how head-on the hit is (relative to the target), replacing the old flat one-charge-per-engagement token. Here both Cavalry gallop into the enemy Infantry at full speed for the full bonus; a stationary or glancing hit earns little, and charging onto braced anti-cavalry spears backfires into a penalty.
